ddt:Target.Name: BCM95_SW9_V9_2
ddt:Target.Description:
XML file generated from : >BCM95_Diagnostic_Requirement_9_2.mdb
Modification report from : >BCM95_Diagnostic_Requirement_9_1.mdb
New Data list : - STACK_LOAD
Remove Data list : - Code APV
Update Data list : - MAX_NB_LOCK_REQUESTS_BY_LWS_TP - PARA_LOC_LEARNING_CONVERGENCE_TIMEOUT - SteeringLock_I_PWR_STEERING - VH_AltLoadErrorManaged - VH_BattVoltErrorManaged
New Service list : - Read_CPU_LOAD
Update Service list : - Read_Combination_Switch_BCM_Input/Output_Status

Data.Name: 0 = SORTIR _ 1 = ENTRER

Data.Comment: Monitoring of customer ID presence inside the vehicle when the engine is running.

Data.Comment: Combi switch input (matrix line 4 ; column 5)

Data.Comment: Combi switch input (matrix line 3 ; column 5)

Data.Name: AFTER_EMERGENCY_ENG_STOP_TM_TP
Data.Comment: Delay after an emergency engine stop during which start button presses has no effect

Data.Name: ALARM_FEEDBACK_ACTIVATION_TM_TP
Data.Comment: Duration of alarm feedback activation.

Data.Name: ALARM_PRESENT_CF
Data.Comment: aftersales volumetric COBRA alarm

Data.Comment: If Hazard button is holding during this time, the BCM considers that the request comes from alarm perimetric and not from the driver

Data.Comment: engineering data representing the internal state of the FAL function

Data.Name: AMBIANCE_LIGHTS_DIM_TP
Data.Comment: Ratio between Intensive and moderate lighting

Data.Name: ANTI_HIJACK_TM_TP
Data.Comment: Maximum time to unlock all the vehicle after a single door unlocking

Data.Comment: Analog input reading of APC relay output

Data.Name: ApprovalNumber.LowerPart
Data.Comment: Certificate

Data.Comment: // Number of consecutively RF frames not received before locking the vehicle in the CF_VSC_WAC_BACKUP mode // Number of consecutively RF frames not received before breaking out the WAC when CF_VSC_WAC_BACKUP mode is disabled // Possible value 4-16

Data.Name: CHANGE_LOCK_W_SPEED_TM_TP

Data.Name: CLUSTER_AND_MM_DISP_ON_TM_TP

Data.Comment: Time to confirm there is no fail any more and cancel DTC

Data.Name: CNT_WAC_LockBYRF
Data.Comment: // EPROM Data * 1 increased each time the vehicle lock in nominal mode on the reception of the acknowledge locking from the card identifier.(all door closed) // Set to 0 at the supplier plant process

Data.Name: CNT_WAC_LockBYRFMemorised
Data.Comment: // EEPROM Datat*1 increased each time the vehicle lock in nominal mode on the closing of the last door. // Set to 0 at the supplier plant process

Data.Name: CNT_WAC_LockBYTimeout
Data.Comment: // EEPROM Data * 1 increased each time the vehicle lock in degraded mode all doors closed // Set to 0 at the supplier plant process

Data.Name: CNT_WAC_LockBYTimeoutMemorised
Data.Comment: // EEPROM Data*1 increased each time the vehicle lock in degraded mode on the closing of the last door // Set to 0 at the supplier plant process

Problem with BCM relay of the Steering Lock power supply
It doesnt reach to wake up the Steering Lock : pb CAN
It doesnt reach to wake up the Steering Lock : pb sensor line

The Steering Lock does not wake up

BCM code and Steering Lock code are different

It doesnt reach to unlock the Steering Lock : locking_finished pb

Sensor line stays active : alim CO / CAn NOK

Data.Name: MAX_ENGINE_START_SEQ_TM_TP
Data.Comment: Maximum time for an engine start sequence. When this delay is elapsed, the engine start sequence is immediately aborted.

Data.Name: MAX_ENGINE_STOP_TM_TP
Data.Comment: Maximum time for the USM to switch off Ignition when BCM try to stop the engine. After that timeout, the ignition is requested ON by BCM

Item.Text: BCM to flash Left DI lamps (DI_LAMP_BY_DIAG = LEFT_ON_AND_RIGHT_OFF in statemate)
BCM to flash Rightt DI lamps (DI_LAMP_BY_DIAG=LEFT_OFF_AND_RIGHT_ON in statemate)
BCM to flash both DI lamps (DI_LAMP_BY_DIAG=LEFT_AND_RIGHT_ON in statemate)

Data.Name: OC_Fuel Lid.Param1
Data.Comment: 4th parameter for I/O request

Item.Text: BCM to lock fuel lid actuator (send R_LOCK_FUEL_BY_DIAG in statemate)
BCM to unlock fuel lid actuator (send R_UNLOCK_FUEL_BY_DIAG in statemate)

Data.Name: OC_Global WindowLift enable.Param1
Data.Comment: 4th parameter for I/O request

Data.Name: OC_GLOVES BOX.Param1
Data.Comment: 4th parameter for I/O request

Item.Text: BCM to lock Gloves Box motors in car body type E (send R_LOCK_GLOVES_BOX_BY_DIAG in statemate)
BCM to unlock Gloves Box motors in car body type E (send R_UNLOCK_GLOVES_BOX_BY_DIAG in statemate)

Data.Name: OC_Rear left window control 1.Param1
Data.Comment: 4th parameter for I/O request

Data.Name: OC_Rear left window control 2.Param1
Data.Comment: 4th parameter for I/O request

Data.Name: OC_Rear right window control 1.Param1
Data.Comment: 4th parameter for I/O request

Data.Name: OC_Rear right window control 2.Param1
Data.Comment: 4th parameter for I/O request

Data.Name: OC_SUPERLOCK.Param1
Data.Comment: 4th parameter for I/O request

Item.Text: BCM to lock SUPERLOCK motors (send R_SUPERLOCK_BY_DIAG in statemate)
BCM to unlock SUPERLOCK motors (send R_DIAG_SUPERUNLOCK_BY_DIAG in statemate)

Data.Name: OH_ElectricalPowerDrived
Data.Comment: Electrical power driven by BCM (announced a few time before its achievement)

Data.Name: OH_PTCEngineIdleSpeedRequest
Data.Comment: Idle engine speed request to ensure PTC optimal working

Data.Name: OH_PTCThermalRegulatorFreeze
Data.Comment: Information for thermal regulation managed in climate ECU

Data.Name: OPEN_ASDM_SYNCHRONIZATION_TM_TP
Data.Comment: Time to synchronize the door motors unlocking by BCM and rear doors opening by ASDM.

Data.Name: Output Control Command
Data.Comment: Testing output : Command enumeration

Data.Name: Output Control Command Permanent
Data.Comment: Testing output : Command enumeration

Data.Name: Output Control Command Temporary
Data.Comment: Testing output : Command enumeration

Data.Name: PaddingDatas
Data.Comment: Spaces in Ascii, added to complete the frame request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: PARA_LOC_LEARNING_DEFAULT
Data.Comment: Autoreloc learning failures counter

Data.Name: PAUSE_TIME_TP
Data.Comment: Pause time between two doorlock actions

Data.Name: PERIMETRIC_ALARM_CF
Data.Comment: perimetric alarm is part of the "pack stress"

Data.Name: Position_roue
Data.Comment: The parameter could be written only if the configuration parameter PRESENCE_SSPP = 1.

Data.Name: PowerOpticalCapter_TP
Data.Comment: Supplying time for optical handle sensors

Item.Text: Tension de sortie du SR trop basse
Tension de sortie du SR trop haute
Tme out de tension SR non atteinte
Tension d'entrée du SR trop faible
Tension d'entrée du SR trop haute

Item.Text: ask the driver stepper to init the motor without standby beetween each steps
ask the driver stepper to command the motor in 0 step position (MAX) without standby between each steps
ask the driver stepper to command the motor in 217 step position (MIN) without standby between each steps
ask the driver stepper to command the motor in 0 step position (MAX) with 47ms standby between each steps
ask the driver stepper to command the motor in 217 step position (MIN) with 47ms standby between each steps
ask the driver stepper to command the motor in 1 step position without standby between each steps
ask the driver stepper to command the motor in 2 step position without standby between each steps
ask the driver stepper to command the motor in 3 step position without standby between each steps
ask the driver stepper to command the motor in refuge position with refuge delay between each steps

ask the driver stepper to command the motor in 2 step position without standby between each steps
ask the driver stepper to command the motor in 3 step position without standby between each steps

Screen.Name: Factory Rework BCM or CID PAIRING

Label.Text: FACTORY REWORK : BCM or Customer ID pairing
1) Complete the "After Sales code" ( 6 bytes) and press the button "ENTER REWORK MODE"
2) If the REWORK MODE for BCM pairing is launched, then insert a customer ID belonging to the vehicle in the reader
4) Once all the customer IDs are paired, select "Validate", and press the button "EXIT REWORK MODE"
3) Select "Standard" or "Servant" and Press the button "Pairing" to pair a customer ID or Restricted Access Card
2) If the REWORK MODE for customer ID pairing is launched, then insert a customer ID (belonging to the vehicle or blank) in the reader
3) Press the button "BCM pairing" to pair the BCM
4) If the BCM is paired, the EXIT of the REWORK MODE is automatic, Then done the pairing of all the customers IDs (procedure in blue)
FACTORY PAIRING of ESCL or ECM ( Rework )
The pairing of the ESCL or ECM in factory is done automatically once the BCM and the customer IDs have been paired at the press on the push to start of the vehicle

Display.DataName: VSC_UCH voit INJECTION vierge ou codée

Label.Text: Protected Pairing : BCM pairing in After Sales
1) You need first to connect to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" : https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login and enter your IPN and Password. Then come back to this screen.
3) Press the button "Request Server BCM pairing"
4) Select the "Input Data Server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
5) Complete the frames in the application and press the button "Calcul".Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in this screen. Then press the button "Transmit Server Answer"
6) If the BCM is SA unlocked for BCM pairing then press the button "BCM pairing" to pair the blank BCM. After the pairing, the exit is automatic. If the BCM is not SA unlocked , press ABANDON
2) Insert the customer ID belonging to the vehicle in the reader

Send.RequestName: SA_Request Seed After Sales BCM Pairing
SA_Send Key After Sales BCM Pairing

Display.RequestName: SA_Request Seed After Sales BCM Pairing

Input.RequestName: SA_Send Key After Sales BCM Pairing
SA_Send Key After Sales BCM Pairing

Label.Text: Protected Pairing : Electrical Steering Column Locked pairing in After Sales
2) Check that the BCM is not blank and the ESCL is blank (try to start the vehicle) and read the ESCL information "SteeringLock Blanck/coded"
4) Select the "Input Data to Server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
5) Complete the frames in the application and press the button "Calcul".Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in this screen. Then press the button "Transmit Server Answer"
6) If the BCM is SA unlocked for ESCL pairing then put the Ignition OFF by removing the customer ID from the reader and then press the button "Authorize ESCL pairing"
7) If the authorization to pair is ok, then insert the customer ID in the reader.If the ESCL is paired ( "SteeringLock Blanck/coded" = 0) the exit of the procedure is automatic.
8) To postpone the authorization to pair the ESCL press the button below
1) You need first to connect to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" : https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login and enter your IPN and Password. Then come back to this screen.

Send.RequestName: SA_Request Seed After Sales ESCL Pairing
SA_Send Key After Sales ESCL Pairing

Display.RequestName: SA_Request Seed After Sales ESCL Pairing

Input.RequestName: SA_Send Key After Sales ESCL Pairing
SA_Send Key After Sales ESCL Pairing

Label.Text: Protected Pairing : Engine Control Module (ECM) pairing in After Sales
2) Check that the ECM is blank (try to start the vehicle) and read the ECM information " VSC_UCH voit INJECTION vierge ou codée"
3) Press the button "Request Server ECM pairing"
4) Select the "Input Data to Server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
5) Complete the frames in the application and press the button "Calcul".Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in this screen. Then press the button "Transmit Server Answer"
1) You need first to connect to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" : https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login and enter your IPN and Password. Then come back to this screen.
6) If the BCM is SA unlocked for ECM pairing then put the Ignition Power Supply OFF by removing the customer ID from the reader and then press the button "Authorize ECM pairing"
7) If the authorization to pair is ok, then insert the customer ID in the reader and press the START/STOP button of the vehicle.If the ECM is paired, the exit of the procedure is automatic.
8) To postpone the authorization to pair the ECM press the button below

Send.RequestName: SA_Request Seed After Sales ECM Pairing
SA_Send Key After Sales ECM Pairing

Display.DataName: VSC_UCH voit INJECTION vierge ou codée

Display.RequestName: SA_Request Seed After Sales ECM Pairing

Input.RequestName: SA_Send Key After Sales ECM Pairing
